description: Opportunity extraction should emit at least one well-formed funding candidate.

candidates.title: River restoration climate resilience grant
candidates.summary: A watershed resilience fund is opening applications for river restoration and community stewardship work.
candidates.rationale: The source contains explicit ecological funding language, a clear applicant motion, and an actionable next step for the coop.
candidates.recommendedNextStep: Review fit with the coop's restoration work and decide whether to brief it for funding.
